chosen_action.title: Tighten marketing-active-loop cron prompt to prevent empty-board fake progress

why_this_action.summary: The current short review window has no truthful do-now handoff packet, but future active-loop runs could still drift back into redundant measurement-hold churn. Tightening the recurring cron prompt is the highest-leverage executable action during the hold because it improves future lane selection without blurring current measurement.
shared_findings_used: marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: primary_repo_flat and overlap repairs are pending measurement
distribution_lane_latest.json: current lane is measurement_hold until 2026-05-25T02:05:05
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet exists in the current review window
adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat and is still the primary success gate

result.summary: Updated the recurring marketing-active-loop cron payload so future runs explicitly avoid regenerating already-current packets, escalate to distribution_architecture_repair when the board stays empty after blockers clear, and treat post-hold rerun improvement as a valid hold-window action.

post_edit_rules_added: do not regenerate already-current packets when the board has no truthful do-now asset
do not log another idle measurement hold after blockers clear; choose a different executable lane or concrete distribution_architecture_repair
treat scheduled post-hold rerun improvement as a valid same-run action during the hold window
